Build AI Chatbot for SaaS Platform (n8n + Claude)

Fixed-price — Budget: $3,500

We need an experienced engineer to build an AI-powered chatbot for our SaaS onboarding flow. Integration with n8n workflows and Claude API required. Experience with Supabase is a plus. Must be able to deliver within 4 weeks.

Intermediate level · Duration: 1 to 3 months · Country: United States

Client info: Payment method verified · $125,000+ spent · 4.9 rating · 47 reviews · 82% hire rate

Proposals: 5 to 10
